expectations.evidence: Output is a .md file with proper markdown formatting including headers, code blocks, and tables
Defines specific hex colors: Primary Green #06A77D, Secondary Teal #055160, Wellness Blue #0D7FB8, status colors with hex codes
Recommends Source Sans Pro for headings/body and IBM Plex Mono for vital signs with rationale for each
Specifically recommends Lucide React and Phosphor Icons for medical icons (section 6, lines 324-362)
Extensively addresses elderly user accessibility: large fonts (16px+ body), high contrast ratios (7:1 AAA), large touch targets (44-48px)
Includes React Native specific guidance with SafeAreaView, FlatList virtualization, color scheme implementation, and component examples
Mentions WCAG AAA level contrast ratios (7:1), specific ratios for colors (5.2:1, 6.8:1, 4.6:1, 5.1:1)
